state.next-action: 44-14 + decision gad-189 shipped 2026-04-15. Scaffolded projects/project-editor/project-editor/ with project.json (published:false) + species/app-forge-baseline/species.json (inherits app-forge v1). Registered as [[evals.roots]] in gad-config.toml; `gad eval list` now shows project-editor. Phase 44.5 renamed "Project Editor + Brood Editor" with locked vocabulary (recipe/species/generation/brood/bestiary) + draft/published model. Task list reshaped — 44.5-01 now Project Editor shell at /projects/[id]/edit with mandatory Visual Context System coverage, plus new tasks 44.5-01a (VCS reference research), 01b (draft/published schema), 01c (editor CTA), 01d (skills-scope panel data source swap), 05 (minecraft inventory grid primitive), 06 (recipe CRUD), 07 (bestiary view), 08 (trait bar + radar), 09 (visual diff tree), 10 (iframe live preview). Saved memory: feedback_visual_context_system_mandatory.md. Next: plan-phase on 44.5-01 starting with 44.5-01a reference research, OR go straight to PLAN.md for 44.5-01 if operator wants to skip the research task.
